title: Session State Checkpoint
description: A durable, disk-derived checkpoint for resumable research sessions (SPEC §6b continuity). scripts/reconcile-session.sh derives this from reports/<topic>/findings/ and a defensive flat reports/<topic>/finding-*.json on disk (plus, when it exists, the cross-topic reports/concordance{,-status}.json one level up, which populates the optional concordance block) so that /resume never reworks completed findings: a finding is DONE once it is schema-valid (validity requires extensions.harness.verification with a verdict, so a valid finding has been through the falsification gate) and not falsified. Partial/invalid findings and *.tmp partial writes are excluded from done-counts. The checkpoint carries no wall-clock field so reconcile is byte-deterministic (the optional concordance block's wall-clock validated_at is deliberately kept out, in reports/concordance-status.json).

findings.description: One record per non-tmp finding file on disk, sorted by id.

valid.description: True iff the finding validates against schemas/findings.schema.json (ajv exit 0).

attempted_at.description: extensions.harness.verification.attempted_at, or null if the gate has not stamped it.

dimensions.description: Per config-declared dimension: total non-tmp findings vs done (valid AND gated). Invalid/partial findings count toward total but never toward done.

checks.description: Per completion-condition check: its pass/fail as computed from disk.

concordance.description: Cross-topic ontological-spine status as of the last reconcile (ADR-0011). built/valid/nodes/edges describe the corpus reports/concordance.json; untyped_shippable is THIS topic's count of survived|weakened findings lacking a valid ontology type (0 in a synthesizable state). Optional — absent when no concordance.json has been built yet. The wall-clock validated_at lives in reports/concordance-status.json, not here, so reconcile stays byte-deterministic.

untyped_shippable.description: Survived|weakened findings in this topic whose ontology-map basis is untyped/unresolved or invalid, or missing from the map. >0 means the ADR-0011 gate would block synthesis.
